note: PII/PHI detection and data-classification costs are based on typical public SaaS/API pricing and open-source self-hosted estimates. Replace defaults with actual vendor quotes, negotiated discounts, and internal labor rates.

providers.name: AWS Macie
providers.billing_model: per 1M sensitive data units (1 SDU ≈ 4 KB)
providers.notes: Managed PII discovery across S3. Pricing tiers lower at scale. Good for storage-centric workloads.
providers.best_for: AWS-native data lakes and S3 buckets

providers.name: Google Cloud Data Loss Prevention
providers.notes: Per-inspection-unit pricing; redaction and de-identification extra. Strong for structured/unstructured content.

providers.name: Azure AI Language PII
providers.notes: Text PII/PHI extraction. Conversation PII and custom categories may add cost. Bundled with Azure AI services.

providers.name: Presidio (open-source, self-hosted)
providers.notes: No license cost; estimate container compute and human maintenance. Use compute-hour cost field to model infrastructure.

providers.name: Nightfall AI
providers.billing_model: per detected finding / tiered platform fee
providers.notes: SaaS DLP with API and browser plugins. Pricing varies by detection volume and seats.

providers.name: OneTrust Privacy & Data Discovery
providers.notes: Enterprise privacy suite; subscription floor is significant. Includes consent, governance, and DSAR tooling.
providers.best_for: Regulated enterprises needing governance beyond detection

providers.name: Private AI
providers.notes: On-device or private-cloud PII detection. Higher per-call cost but avoids sending data to third-party clouds.

providers.name: Amazon Comprehend PII
providers.notes: Per-character pricing; use for text messages and documents. Custom entity recognition is separate.
providers.best_for: AWS apps with text-heavy agent inputs/outputs

providers.name: LLM-based classifier (OpenAI / Anthropic)
providers.notes: Use an LLM to classify, tag, and redact sensitive content. Cost scales with prompt length and classification labels.
providers.best_for: Complex or custom categories beyond built-in PII patterns

classification_depths.name: PII only (name, email, phone, address, SSN)
